title: dianthus monspessulanus var. alpestris
intro: Dianthus monspessulanus var. alpestris, also known as the Alpine Pink, is a variety of the Dianthus monspessulanus plant, a type of flowering plant in the carnation family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Dianthus monspessulanus var. alpestris include relieving digestive issues, reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
